title: Extra dungeons
description: Adds 6 extra Dungeons to the underground
body:
Overview:

This mod adds 6 new dungeons to the underground.

There is now a new dungeon for:

- Skeleton
- Zombie
- Drowned
- Stray
- Husk
- Spider

![dungeon](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/mod/2024/087/18257977-skeletondungeon_l.webp)
  

Design:

Each dungeon features it's respective spawner, traps and a final loot room.

The rooms are uniquely themed based on the dungeon's mob type and the loot room at the end contains different rewards.

 

Spawning:

The Skeleton, Spider, and Zombie dungeons can generate in any biome.

The Drowned, Husk, and Stray dungeons are biome-specific:

Stray = snowy/ice biomes

Husk = desert

Drowned = ocean biomes 

 

 

 

The dungeons were inspired by Grian and reworked to fit into newer versions.

Old orginal designs made by Grian:
